name: Colt
description: Colt is the star attraction at Starr Park! His good looks, charisma and gun twirling tricks win over any audience, except maybe Shelly.
descriptionHtml: Colt is the star attraction at Starr Park! His good looks, charisma and gun twirling tricks win over any audience, except maybe Shelly.

starPowers.name: Slick Boots
starPowers.description: Colt's movement speed is increased by x%.
starPowers.descriptionHtml: Colt's movement speed is increased by x%.

starPowers.name: Magnum Special
starPowers.description: Colt's attack range and bullet speed are increased by x%.
starPowers.descriptionHtml: Colt's attack range and bullet speed are increased by x%.

gadgets.name: Speedloader
gadgets.description: Colt fires two quick shots that slow targets. Deals <!card.accessory.skill.damage.scaleToLevel> damage.
gadgets.descriptionHtml: Colt fires two quick shots that slow targets. Deals  damage.

gadgets.name: Silver Bullet
gadgets.description: Colt fires a bullet that destroys the environment and pierces Brawlers. Deals <!card.accessory.skill.damage.scaleToLevel> damage. Consumes ammo.
gadgets.descriptionHtml: Colt fires a bullet that destroys the environment and pierces Brawlers. Deals  damage. Consumes ammo.
